explicit_text: Milwaukee became home to my great-great-grandfather Frank Klode as he grew older and began working at Fischer Furniture. It was also where my grandfather Emil was born in 1887 and where The Klode Furniture Company was established in 1920. Milwaukee is the city where our family business flourished and where much of our family history took place.

explicit_text: The Klode Furniture Company was founded by my grandfather Emil in 1920 and became a huge success in Milwaukee. It started on North Broadway and later expanded to a six-floor building on Plankinton Avenue. This family-run business was eventually taken over by my grandfather James and remained important to Milwaukee's history until it closed in 1979.

explicit_text: My father, Frederick Klode, attended the University of Wisconsin–Madison where he earned a degree in industrial engineering. His education there helped him start The Klode Company as a manufacturers' representative after graduation. The university played a key role in shaping his career and continuing our family’s entrepreneurial tradition.
